scripts.clean: npx rimraf reports allure-results allure-report playwright-report test-results
scripts.test:auth: npm run clean && npx playwright test tests/auth
scripts.test:pim: npm run clean && npx playwright test tests/pim
scripts.test:smoke: npm run clean && npx playwright test --grep @Smoke
scripts.report: npx allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && npx allure open allure-report
